tasks.title: Verify VPS env loading (BUFFER_*, X_*, APIFY_TOKEN in container)
tasks.notes: SSH into openclaw-h3mk and confirm all required env vars are present in the running container. Check /docker/openclaw-h3mk/data/.openclaw/.env is loaded by docker-compose. Required vars: BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN, BUFFER_CHANNEL_ID, BUFFER_ORGANIZATION_ID, X_API_KEY, X_API_SECRET, X_ACCESS_TOKEN, X_ACCESS_SECRET, APIFY_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.

tasks.title: Create and verify VPS state directory
tasks.notes: Ensure /docker/openclaw-h3mk/data/.openclaw/state exists and is writable by the container user. Required files: posted-log.json (array), post-errors.json (array), calendar-state.json (object), reply-log.json (array), scheduled-post-state.json (object). Create as empty stubs if missing.

tasks.title: Add --dry-run flag to post_to_buffer.js
tasks.notes: When --dry-run is passed, validate env vars and payload structure but do NOT call the Buffer API. Print DRY_RUN: payload JSON to stdout and exit 0. Required before any live posting test.

tasks.title: Add --dry-run flag to scripts/tweet.js
tasks.notes: When --dry-run is passed, validate env vars and payload but do NOT call Twitter API. Print DRY_RUN: payload JSON to stdout and exit 0. Required before any live tweet test.

tasks.title: Add BUFFER_ORGANIZATION_ID to .env.example
tasks.notes: Currently missing from .env.example but required by /api/buffer-queue. Add it alongside BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN and BUFFER_CHANNEL_ID with a comment explaining it's the Buffer org ID (not channel ID).

tasks.title: Re-wire /sasha dashboard routes in task-server.js
tasks.notes: The new MangaOS task-server.js replaced the old Sasha-specific one and dropped /api/sasha-state, /api/buffer-queue, and /sasha routes. Re-add all three to the current 1247-line file. sasha.html exists and already consumes these endpoints.

tasks.title: Write BOOT.md startup instructions
tasks.notes: Current BOOT.md is a template placeholder. Write actual OpenCLAW boot instructions: which hooks to enable on startup, which skills to load, Telegram notification on boot, state directory check. This defines what happens when the container restarts.

tasks.title: Create content/active-brief.md
tasks.notes: Listed in CLAUDE.md as a VPS-consumed file but does not exist in content/. Create with the current campaign brief for the 'Sasha Goes Live' campaign (2026-04-28 to 2026-05-28). Runtime skills read this to understand the active content direction.

tasks.title: Add /api/sasha-runtime-health endpoint
tasks.notes: New endpoint: SSH to VPS and check container up/down status, OpenCLAW cron jobs enabled, next run times, last run status. Returns structured JSON with no secret values. Part of the operational cockpit plan.

tasks.title: Add /api/sasha-content endpoint
tasks.notes: New endpoint: read content/calendar.json, content/scheduled-posts.json, content/reply-targets.json, content/narrative-arc.md from local filesystem and return as a single JSON payload. Dashboard uses this to surface current content inputs.

tasks.title: Add /api/sasha-credentials endpoint
tasks.notes: New endpoint: return boolean presence status for each required env var (BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN, BUFFER_CHANNEL_ID, BUFFER_ORGANIZATION_ID, X_API_KEY, X_API_SECRET, X_ACCESS_TOKEN, X_ACCESS_SECRET, APIFY_TOKEN). Never return values — only true/false per key.

tasks.title: Add /api/sasha-deploy-status endpoint
tasks.notes: New endpoint: return local git HEAD commit hash/message + VPS deployed workspace commit (read from a deploy-manifest.json written by deploy.sh on --execute). Also return last deploy timestamp. No secrets.

tasks.title: Create preflight script (scripts/preflight.sh)
tasks.notes: Non-destructive script that checks: env propagation to container, state directory writable, cron jobs enabled, Buffer GraphQL reachable (HEAD request only), X credential presence, Apify token presence, /api/sasha-state endpoint responding. Outputs pass/fail per check. Run before any deploy.

tasks.title: Create post-deploy verification script (scripts/verify-deploy.sh)
tasks.notes: Runs after ./deploy.sh --execute. Confirms VPS runtime can see deployed content/ files by SSHing and checking file mtimes. Also restarts container if openclaw.json was in the sync set and confirms container is back up.

tasks.title: Write docs/sasha-ops-runbook.md
tasks.notes: Document the full operating procedure: daily startup check, how to queue posts, how to run dry-run tests, how to deploy, how to read the dashboard, how to SSH-tail logs, how to restart the container, what to do when a post fails. Single source of truth for ops.

tasks.title: Investigate QMD/Qdrant memory integration
tasks.notes: QMD (Qdrant) is referenced in _context/tool-registry.md and product-info.md as the memory backend, but no local skill files exist and the integration status is unknown. Determine if it is: (a) installed and working on VPS, (b) installed but broken, (c) not installed at all. Scope a fix or decision to remove the dependency.

tasks.title: Buffer dry-run smoke test
tasks.notes: After onb-03 is done: run `node post_to_buffer.js --text 'test' --dry-run` and confirm it validates env + prints payload without queuing. Blocked on onb-03.

tasks.title: X reply dry-run smoke test
tasks.notes: After onb-04 is done: run `node scripts/tweet.js --text 'test' --dry-run` and confirm it validates env + prints payload without tweeting. Blocked on onb-04.

tasks.title: Add Sasha visual reference images for lifestyle image generation
tasks.notes: Visual profile written from reference images → images/references/visual-profile.md and VPS /data/.openclaw/workspace/content/sasha-references/visual-profile.md. STILL NEEDED: upload actual .jpg reference files to VPS. Use: scp -i ~/.ssh/hostinger_vps <image_path> root@187.77.42.134:/docker/openclaw-h3mk/data/.openclaw/workspace/content/sasha-references/ Files needed: ref-01-headshot.jpg, ref-02-fullbody-studio.jpg, ref-03-character-sheet.jpg, ref-04-brand-sheet.jpg
